[meta]
schema_version = "0.1"

[profile]
name = "default_local_workstation"
max_context_tokens = 8192
max_concurrent_models = 1
allow_premium = false
mode = "warn"

[backends.mlx]
kind = "mlx"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:8081"
default = true

[routing.code]
model = "mlx-community/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-4bit"
backend = "mlx"
fallback = []
